_comment: FILE: monitoring/grafana-dashboard.json — import this into Grafana to get a pre-built dashboard
_what_to_build: 1. Request rate by version (stable vs canary) — uses http_requests_total with version label
2. Error rate by version — filter status_code=~'5..' and divide by total
3. p50/p95 latency by version — uses http_request_duration_seconds histogram
4. SLO burn rate — canary error rate vs 5% threshold (draw a threshold line)
Export from Grafana UI after building, then paste the JSON here so it can be
committed and re-imported via GitOps / provisioning.
